caption: Cavalry now forms on its own grid pitch -- about a metre between files and three between ranks, the riding room a horse needs -- so the 80-horse regiment (right) stands wider and far deeper (220x360 world units at spawn) than the 120-man Infantry block (left, unchanged close order, 126x63). Both march a short leg forward; the deep column moves as one body and settles cleanly on its grid (the defect scan's misslot check reads 0.0).
